title: Fantasy Weaponry
description: Reimagined tools and weapons in an epic fantasy style including longswords, enchanted bows, and hidden secrets...
body:
![Pack Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49c9cf5dd43e946171060e2aa9bfa56482cc298f.png)

# Description
This fantasy - styled resource pack adds over 100 weapons to your game in the form of renamed items! Simply choose the weapon or tool that you want to change, and rename it in an anvil according to the guide below.

Most of the pack is comprised of ranked weapons _(e.g:copper,netherite,diamond)_ however there are a few other features such as the ancient toolset, a frostbound scepter, or a runic longsword! All of these features can be seen in the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bps-fantasy-weaponry/gallery) and the table below.

### NEW IN UPDATE 2.0 (Important)
You can now rename items with their tier - specific prefix (e.g. Diamond Battle Axe or Copper Scimitar) This is only different to the spiked sword, where you need to insert it like this: Spiked [Tier] Sword.


<details>
<summary>Sneak Peek</summary>

![Arsenal 01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8eb29d576e508edd4ce699f06741df335d678365.png)

</details>

# Renames **(CASE SENSITIVE)**
## Sword Renames
### All Swords (Copper - Netherite):
**Rename to:**
- Longsword
- Short Sword
- Double Sword
- Kunai
- Knife or Butcher's Knife
- Scimitar
- Katar
- Cinquedea
- Spiked Sword (See above)
- Hunting Knife
### Netherite Sword:
- Nether Blade
- Runic Nether Blade
- Runic Longsword
### Wooden Toolset:
- Replace _"Wooden"_ with _"Ancient"_ on any tool
- Replace _"Wooden"_ with _"Rustic"_ on any tool
### Wooden Pickaxe
- Fantasy Pickaxe
- Mountain Pickaxe
### Wooden Sword:
- Fantasy Sword
### Stone Sword:
- Longsword
### All Hoes (Copper - Netherite):
- Sickle
- Scythe
### All Spears (Copper - Netherite):
- Ji Spear
- Ranseur
- Rapier
- Halberd
- Scepter
- Tuning Fork
- Military Fork
### Diamond Spear:
- Frostbound Scepter
### All Axes (Copper - Netherite):
- Battle Axe
- Carpenter's Axe
- Guard's Axe
- Club
- Highland Axe
- Thor's Axe
### All Shovels (Copper - Netherite):
- Trowel
- Spoon
- Spatula
- Fire Douser
### Snowballs:
- Copper Shuriken
- Iron Shuriken
- Golden Shuriken
- Diamond Shuriken
- Netherite Shuriken
- Copper Chakram
- Iron Chakram
- Golden Chakram
- Diamond Chakram
- Netherite Chakram

## Please Note:
This pack is inspired by Mickey Joe's "Too Many Renames" pack. Thanks to Mickey Joe for inspiring me to create this pack!
